title: soothing  backgrounds
description: this is a resourcepack that adds loading screens with images from official minecraft lofi videos
body:
# important info
- this is a resourcepack adding several new loading screens with the use of the [loading backgrounds mod](https://modrinth.com/project/dH40biZd)
- it uses images from the soothing videos on the [official minecraft youtube channel](https://youtube.com/@minecraft?si=wS4CGX5pUUWIspME)
- these loading backgrounds are not animated!
- dependent on the loading backgrounds mod
